keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 0. Toni Martínez (Alaves) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Alaves. Carlos Protesoni replaces Victor Parada because of an injury.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Sergio Camello replaces Carlos Martín because of an injury.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Jorge de Frutos replaces Álvaro García.
Second Half begins Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 0.
Sergio Camello (Rayo Vallecano) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Alemão replaces Óscar Valentín.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Pathé Ciss replaces Abdul Mumin.
Pathé Ciss (Rayo Vallecano) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ángel Pérez (Alaves) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 1. Sergio Camello (Rayo Vallecano) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Pathé Ciss.
Substitution, Alaves. Denis Suárez replaces Pablo Ibáñez.
Abde Rebbach (Alaves) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Alaves. Ander Guevara replaces Jon Guridi.
Substitution, Alaves. Ibrahim Diabate replaces Lucas Boyé.
Nahuel Tenaglia (Alaves) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Rayo Vallecano. Andrei Ratiu replaces Iván Balliu.
Goal! Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 2. Randy Nteka (Rayo Vallecano) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Sergio Camello.
Pacha Espino (Rayo Vallecano) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 2.

scoringPlays.text: Goal! Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 0. Toni Martínez (Alaves) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner.
Carlos Protesoni replaces Victor Parada because of an injury.
Sergio Camello replaces Carlos Martín because of an injury.
Jorge de Frutos replaces Álvaro García.
Sergio Camello (Rayo Vallecano) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Pathé Ciss (Rayo Vallecano) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ángel Pérez (Alaves) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 1. Sergio Camello (Rayo Vallecano) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Pathé Ciss.
Abde Rebbach (Alaves) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Nahuel Tenaglia (Alaves) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Alaves 1, Rayo Vallecano 2. Randy Nteka (Rayo Vallecano) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Sergio Camello.
Pacha Espino (Rayo Vallecano) is shown the yellow card.
